hero.title: Websites That Actually Grow Your Business
hero.subtitle: Custom-built or template-based, we create fast, beautiful, and conversion-focused websites. From e-commerce to portfolios, we've got you covered.

websiteTypes.title: Every Type of Website You Need
websiteTypes.subtitle: From simple landing pages to complex e-commerce platforms, we build exactly what your business needs
websiteTypes.bottomText: Don't see what you need? We build custom solutions too.

types.title: E-commerce Store (Custom)
types.description: Full-featured online store built from scratch with Laravel or Next.js. Complete control, unlimited products, custom features.

types.title: E-commerce (WordPress)
types.description: Quick-launch online store using WooCommerce. Perfect for getting started fast with proven templates.

types.title: Business Website
types.description: Professional multi-page website for companies, agencies, or organizations. Build credibility and attract customers.

types.title: Landing Page
types.description: Single-page website designed to convert visitors into customers. Perfect for ads, campaigns, or product launches.

types.title: Portfolio Website
types.description: Showcase your work beautifully. Perfect for designers, photographers, developers, freelancers, or artists.

types.title: Custom Dashboard/Web App
types.description: Admin panels, SaaS platforms, internal tools, or custom web applications built with React/Next.js.

types.title: Blog/Content Website
types.description: WordPress-powered blog or content site. Easy to manage, SEO-friendly, perfect for content creators.

types.title: Booking/Service Website
types.description: For service businesses, salons, consultants, or clinics. Accept bookings and manage appointments online.

cta.title: Need something specific?

process.title: From Idea to Live Website in 5 Steps
process.subtitle: A clear, simple process with no surprises. You'll always know what's happening and what's next.
process.ctaText: Ready to get started? Let's kick off your project.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We start with a free 30-45 minute call to understand your business, goals, and what you need. No technical jargon — just a clear conversation.

steps.title: Proposal & Design Mockup
steps.description: You receive a detailed proposal with a fixed price, timeline, and a design mockup so you can see what your website will look like before we build anything.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: We build your website. You get regular updates via WhatsApp or email. The timeline depends on complexity — landing pages take 3 days, custom platforms take up to 3 weeks.

steps.title: Review & Revisions
steps.description: You review the complete website on a staging link and request any changes. We offer unlimited revisions during this phase — we don't stop until you're 100% happy.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.description: We deploy your website live, set up your domain and hosting, and provide a training session. Then you get 1 month of free support for any issues or small updates.

pricingCalculator.title: How Much Will Your Website Cost?
pricingCalculator.subtitle: Configure your project and get an instant ballpark estimate. No forms, no waiting.
pricingCalculator.step1: 1. What type of website do you need?

result.disclaimer: Final quote depends on exact requirements. Book a free consultation for a precise estimate.

cta.title: Want an exact quote?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll send a detailed proposal within 24 hours.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our web development services, answered honestly.

questions.question: Do I own the website after delivery?
questions.answer: Yes, 100%. Once the project is complete and payment is finalised, you receive the full source code and all assets. We don't lock you into any proprietary system — the website is entirely yours.

questions.question: Can I update the content myself after launch?
questions.answer: Absolutely. All WordPress and template-based websites come with an easy-to-use admin panel. For custom builds, we provide a CMS or admin dashboard so you can update text, images, and products without touching code. We also provide a training session on launch day.

questions.question: What if I don't like the design?
questions.answer: We share a design mockup before writing a single line of code. You can request changes at that stage. Once you approve the design and we build it, we offer unlimited revision requests during the review phase until you're 100% satisfied.

questions.question: Do you provide hosting and domain?
questions.answer: We don't sell hosting or domains directly, but we help you set everything up. We'll guide you through purchasing from Hostinger, Namecheap, or your preferred provider, then configure and deploy your website there as part of the project.

questions.question: What about website maintenance after launch?
questions.answer: Every project includes 1 month of free support for bugs and small updates. After that, we offer optional monthly maintenance packages starting from ৳3,000/month covering security updates, backups, content changes, and performance monitoring.

questions.question: Can you redesign my existing website?
questions.answer: Yes. We handle full redesigns and partial overhauls. Share your current website and tell us what's not working — we'll propose the best approach, whether that's a fresh build or improving what you already have.

questions.question: How do payments work?
questions.answer: We take 50% upfront to begin the project and 50% upon delivery before the final handover. We accept bKash, Nagad, bank transfer, and international payments via Wise or PayPal for international clients.

questions.question: Can you integrate bKash or Nagad payments into my website?
questions.answer: Yes. We integrate bKash, Nagad, SSLCommerz, and other Bangladeshi payment gateways. The integration is an add-on starting from ৳8,000 depending on the gateway and complexity required.

questions.question: How long does the project take?
questions.answer: It depends on the type. Landing pages take 3–5 days, WordPress e-commerce 5–7 days, business websites 7–10 days, and custom web apps 2–4 weeks. You can estimate your timeline using the pricing calculator above.

questions.question: Do you work with international clients?
questions.answer: Yes. We work remotely with clients worldwide. Communication is via WhatsApp, Slack, or email. Payments from international clients are accepted via Wise or PayPal.

stillHaveQuestions.title: Still Have Questions?
stillHaveQuestions.subtitle: Our team is happy to answer anything before you commit. No pressure, just honest advice.

simpleCta.title: Let's Build Something Great Together
simpleCta.subtitle: From a simple landing page to a full e-commerce platform — we deliver websites that look professional and actually bring results.
simpleCta.finalNote: 💡 Not sure where to start? Book a free 30-minute consultation and we'll guide you.
